_meta.description: Quebec family offices - recherche web publique 2026-05-07. Capital Norvex Inc. cible : single-family offices, multi-family offices, holdings de familles fortunées QC qui placent du capital en immobilier privé commercial / hypothèques privées. Tickets 1M-50M$. Sources : Canadian Family Offices, sites corporatifs, LinkedIn pages publiques, presse (Les Affaires, La Presse, Finance et Investissement), CAFA.

familyOffices.name: Paul Desmarais III
familyOffices.title: Chairman & CEO
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Global alternative assets (PE, VC, credit, real estate) for institutional and family clients; North American real estate via Everwest platform
familyOffices.approachAngle: Commercial real estate 5M-30M CAD via PE vehicle; mandats discrétionnaires pour capital famille en immobilier québécois
familyOffices.notes: Sagard 45B$+ AUM. Family office via Power Corp. Everwest real estate funds. Présence QC.

familyOffices.name: Stephen Bronfman
familyOffices.title: Principal
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Private equity, real estate, and diversified long-term investments NA with focus on Quebec development projects
familyOffices.approachAngle: Direct Quebec RE development (2000+ unit residential portfolio); institutional co-investment multifamily 10M-30M$
familyOffices.notes: Établi 1987. Les Bassins du Nouveau Havre (2000 units), Le Seville (120M$). Construction et RE syndication active.

familyOffices.name: Pierre Somers
familyOffices.title: Chairman & CEO
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Private equity, venture capital, public markets, real estate; focus innovation et entrepreneurial ventures
familyOffices.approachAngle: Mid-market QC commercial RE co-investment; family office 6.4B$ AUM cherche structures discrétionnaires private credit/equity
familyOffices.notes: Fondé 1952. 6.4B$ AUM. Walter Capital Partners mid-market PE.

familyOffices.name: Lorne Trottier
familyOffices.title: Founder
familyOffices.investmentThesis: Alternative asset classes (PE, VC, RE, agriculture) avec focus ESG/sustainability et réduction GES
familyOffices.approachAngle: Quebec real estate aligné climat/impact social; capital patient cherche tickets 10M-25M$ co-investment
familyOffices.notes: Eclipx family office. Foundation 1B$+ assets. Co-fondateur Matrox. Mandat sustainability.

familyOffices.notes: 8B$ AUM. HQ Montréal (1926). Real Estate Capital direct investment access.

familyOffices.notes: Établi 1992. Multi-asset family office MTL. Estate planning et intergenerational wealth.

familyOffices.title: CEO & Chairman
familyOffices.investmentThesis: VC, PE, private credit, real estate, royalties; focus innovation, entrepreneurship, responsible investing
familyOffices.approachAngle: QC RE syndication ESG/impact; family office 5M-20M$ multifamily projects durables
familyOffices.notes: Fondé 2009. Fednav International founder wealth. Climat tech et RE.

familyOffices.title: Principal

familyOffices.approachAngle: Family office capital via personal holding; QC RE aligné écosystème Quebecor 10M-30M$
familyOffices.notes: Quebecor CEO. Vidéotron founder legacy wealth. Holding via Péladeau Investments. 40M$+ philanthropie/an.

familyOffices.name: Famille Chagnon (héritiers)
familyOffices.title: Foundation Board

familyOffices.notes: Vidéotron founder (1.4B$ endowment création). 32M$+ distributions/an. RE activity dans student housing.

familyOffices.title: Principal

familyOffices.approachAngle: Post-Metro acquisition (2018) wealth diversification; portfolio 400+ pharmacies legacy holdings
familyOffices.notes: Jean Coutu Group vendu Metro 2018 (4.5B$). Family liquidity. Pharmacy RE portfolio.

familyOffices.notes: 3B$+ Canam business. 2020 acquisition avec CDPQ/FTQ. Manufacturing wealth. Construction expertise.

familyOffices.title: Principal

familyOffices.notes: Famille Audet contrôle 71% voting via Gestion Audem. Cogeco 7B$+ telecom. Famille refusé multiples takeover bids.

familyOffices.notes: Franco-Nevada founder (1.2B$+ IPO). Mining royalty expertise. Scope international via Firelight.
